scenarios.name: Homepage latest day hydration
scenarios.description: Verified that the homepage latest-run, Today's Change, scoreboard, garden stats, and internal links now source the April 23 day bundle.
scenarios.details: Covers the homepage latest-day regression that previously stalled on April 22.

scenarios.name: Day-detail artifact strip
scenarios.description: Verified that /days/?date=2026-04-23 has a complete public artifact bundle instead of a partial shell.
scenarios.details: All expected April 23 artifact files are present under site/days/2026-04-23.

scenarios.name: Manifest latest-date advancement
scenarios.description: Verified that site/days/manifest.json advances the public archive to April 23.
scenarios.details: The latest manifest entry is now 2026-04-23 with shipped status.

scenarios.name: Homepage internal link audit
scenarios.description: Verified that rendered internal homepage hrefs include the April 23 day route and resolve 200.
scenarios.details: The homepage link collector now finds /days/?date=2026-04-23 among the rendered internal links.

notes: This bundle fixes a publish-state regression: the homepage was still hydrating April 22 because the public April 23 artifact set had not been published under site/days.
